title: Iranian Man Arrested After Trying to Enter U.K. Naval Base, Police Say
summary_full: The man and a Romanian woman walked up to the gate of the base in Scotland, where nuclear-armed submarines are docked, and asked to be let in, an official said.
summary_public: The man and a Romanian woman walked up to the gate of the base in Scotland, where nuclear-armed submarines are docked, and asked to be let in, an official said.

GB.label: neutral
GB.evidence: trying to enter U.K. Naval Base
